docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MIKAEL, GREENING

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAARI, KEIJO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIKAEL, GREENING BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO $1,595.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,675.00, DEFENDANT MIKAEL GREENING IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AND DEFENDANT BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO IS ADDED TO THE COMPLAINT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,595.00 FILED BY TAARI, KEIJO AS TO DEFENDANT MIKAEL, GREENING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-03-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-03-2010 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF TAARI, KEIJO
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO SHANNON MCGUINNIS APPEARS ON BEHALF OF MIKEAL GREENING OF BMW OF SF FILED BY TAARI, KEIJO MIKAEL, GREENING
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2010 - JUDGMENT.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT RECEIVED AND FILED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAARI, KEIJO AS TO DEFENDANT MIKAEL, GREENING BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED OCT-19-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MIKAEL, GREENING
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO GREENING MIKAEL BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-03-2010 AT 1:30PM.
